title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PULONGCAWAYAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LA PAZ, PROVINCE OF TARLAC, TO LA PURISIMA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3662 / 57 OG No. 9, 1562 (February 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2844, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF PULONGCAWAYAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LA PAZ, PROVINCE OF TARLAC, TO LA PURISIMA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Pulongcawayan in the Municipality of La Paz, Province of Tarlac, is changed to La Purisima.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
